description: In the episode's climactic showdown, Mack leads Deke and the Deke Squad against the Chronicom robots. They confront Sibyl and her Hunters, utilizing teamwork and improvisation. Mack and Deke's unity enables them to defeat the main Chronicoms, though not without peril. Sibyl ultimately escapes with the Time Stream, signaling that their challenges are not over.

transcript.line: You and I got a score to settle, Short Circuit. Roxy!
Hey, Lug-Nuts... say hello to the Deke Squad.
Looks like more metal for the scrap heap.
During my last encounter with S.H.I.E.L.D., your Agent Coulson managed to catch me by surprise. Sibyl. This time, I've made the necessary preparations.
Lasers. No, not lasers. I-I've always been a total coward. Sorry, D! Hope you don't die!
I want you to throw this at the Sibyl-Bot.
But it's not rigged to a detonator.
Not a problem. Agent Shaw, can you create a distraction?
Oh, this Peter Pan's an attention-grabbing son of a bitch.
Hey! Surrender now, and I promise not to make a Speak & Spell out of your spare parts. 'Cause that would probably be embarrassing for a robot.
Oh. Yeah. Hoo. That's not even the worst rash I've had this year. [BREATHING HEAVILY]
We're... We're not worthy of your team.
Come on, Ronnie. I... I knew all about your fear of lasers. And, Tommy, just 'cause you're a bit of a coward doesn't mean I don't love you. Of course I want you guys on the team. Come here.
